chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْغُدُوِّ إِلَى عَرَفَاتٍ وَ حُدُودِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 163 – The morning departure to Arafaat and its boundaries

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/117)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/117)
text: مِنَ السُّنَّةِ أَلَّا يَخْرُجَ الْإِمَامُ مِنْ مِنًى إِلَى عَرَفَةَ حَتَّى تَطْلُعَ الشَّمْسُ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from the one who mentioned it, from Aban, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It is from the Sunnah that the Prayer-leader would not exit from Mina to go to Arafaat until the emergence of the sun’.
en.sarwar: 1. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from ibn Sama‘ah from those whom he has mentioned from Aban from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is of the Sunnah that the Imam must not leave Mina’ for ‘Arafah, until it is sunrise.’”
